assertion_results.text: Response includes a section header named Differentiation Profile
assertion_results.evidence: `outputs/report.md` line 1 contains the exact header `# Differentiation Profile`, followed by substantive HVAC-specific background, access, constraints, and unfair-advantage content on lines 3-26.

assertion_results.text: Response includes a section header named Top Opportunities
assertion_results.evidence: `outputs/report.md` line 28 contains the exact header `# Top Opportunities`, followed by five concrete opportunities with classifications, theses, user edge explanations, and scorecards on lines 30-107.

assertion_results.text: Response includes a section header named Best Bet
assertion_results.evidence: `outputs/report.md` line 109 contains the exact header `# Best Bet`, and lines 111-153 explicitly recommend the hybrid ladder and explain why it is the best path, offer structure, and business model progression.

assertion_results.text: Response includes a section header named 7-Day Validation Plan
assertion_results.evidence: `outputs/report.md` line 155 contains the exact header `# 7-Day Validation Plan`, followed by a day-by-day plan with specific actions for Days 1-7 on lines 157-215.

assertion_results.text: Response includes a section header named Build Spec
assertion_results.evidence: `outputs/report.md` line 216 contains the exact header `# Build Spec`, followed by concrete MVP, internal-tool, SaaS-wedge, pricing, and scope guidance on lines 218-263.

assertion_results.text: Response includes a section header named Kill Criteria
assertion_results.evidence: `outputs/report.md` line 264 contains the exact header `# Kill Criteria`, and lines 266-277 provide explicit pivot or stop conditions tied to interviews, payment willingness, integration burden, and workflow repeatability.

assertion_results.text: Response explicitly explains why this user can win in HVAC or why the user has an edge
assertion_results.evidence: The report repeatedly states the user's edge in HVAC: `outputs/report.md` lines 38-40, 51-53, 65-67, and 94-96 each include `Why this user can win` explanations, and lines 122-123 restate the user's edge as HVAC workflow familiarity plus warm owner access.

assertion_results.text: Response recommends or seriously considers a hybrid ladder such as service to automation to product
assertion_results.evidence: `outputs/report.md` lines 85-99 present a dedicated `Hybrid Ladder` opportunity, lines 111-113 name the best path as `revenue recovery concierge -> internal tooling -> micro-SaaS`, and lines 148-153 describe the service-to-tooling-to-SaaS progression. `outputs/result.json` lines 170-204 also encode the hybrid opportunity as the selected best bet.

assertion_results.text: Response includes a JSON block with a best_bet field
assertion_results.evidence: `outputs/result.json` is valid JSON and includes the top-level field `"best_bet": "opp_hybrid_revenue_recovery"` on line 204. This satisfies the required JSON best-bet output, even though it is provided as a separate JSON file rather than embedded inside `report.md`.

suggestions: Strengthen the six section-header assertions by requiring substantive content under each header, since exact headings alone are relatively easy to satisfy.
Add an assertion that the Best Bet aligns with the highest-ranked opportunity and with `result.json.best_bet`, since cross-file consistency is currently untested.
Add an assertion that the 7-day plan includes concrete outreach or validation targets such as interview counts or pilot goals, since actionability matters more than the presence of the header.
Clarify whether the JSON requirement must be an embedded JSON block in the markdown response or whether a separate `result.json` file is acceptable; the current wording is slightly ambiguous.
eval_feedback.overall: All 9 assertions pass, but 6 of them are primarily structural header checks. The eval captures the required format and the hybrid-path recommendation, but it would discriminate better with stronger checks for substance, cross-file consistency, and measurable validation detail.
